meaning: n.眼孔,孔眼,小孔,针眼,金属圈
examples: Mainly use jeans button, snap button, rivet and eyelet.
It was a sleeveless, long white eyelet gown with a scoop neck.
Measure the total length of the tension cable from eyelet to eyelet with a tape measure.
Each eyelet is separated from its neighbours by rows of fine, brush-like hairs called microtrichia.
Most pairs make it back to the barn for minor surgery: new ankle padding, a sole or an eyelet.
